title: Cycle-02 fix-check closure and residual doc consistency cleanup
description: Completed the cycle-02 post-remediation verification pass by fixing the last stale queue-name documentation references and producing a dedicated fix-check artifact that maps each prior audit-report-2 finding (B1/H1/H2/H3/M1/M2) to current static evidence.

errors.error: Queue prefix wording still referenced the old colon-style naming.
errors.cause: A residual documentation line from earlier queue naming conventions remained after broader remediation updates.
errors.fix: Updated Redis/BullMQ queue-prefix wording to the current hyphen-style prefix (`campusops-`).

errors.error: Metric alert queue name still used legacy `campusops:metric-alert-check` notation.
errors.cause: One troubleshooting step was not updated during the prior documentation synchronization sweep.
errors.fix: Replaced the stale queue reference with the current `campusops-metric-alert-check` queue name.

errors.error: No dedicated cycle-02 artifact existed to explicitly confirm whether audit-report-2 findings were closed.
errors.cause: Remediation changes were present, but a focused fix-check document had not been produced in the cycle-02 report folder.
errors.fix: Created `audit_report-2-fix_check.md` with finding-by-finding status and direct code/doc/test evidence references.

rootCause: Final consistency and closure reporting steps were partially complete: two legacy queue-name doc references remained and a formal cycle-level fix-check artifact had not yet been written.
impact: Without these session fixes, audit closure traceability remained weaker and static review could still surface avoidable documentation inconsistencies.

validation.method: Static verification in workspace: targeted code/doc checks and markdown legacy-reference scans, plus user-reported `run_tests.sh` success.
